intent: Give travel and city-walk photos a calm film-like color palette with muted saturation, gentle contrast, and nostalgic but clean tones.

tone_guidance.black_point: slightly lifted only when it improves the film feel

color_guidance.greens: desaturate and move away from harsh digital green
color_guidance.reds_or_oranges: keep warm subjects pleasant but not punchy

parameter_strategy: Agent must infer concrete values per photo from preview analysis. Use this card as direction, not as a fixed preset.
